message:
fix(demo): center hero text relative to console width (bd-2kti)

The hero text in the layout scene was using a fixed 60-column width
for alignment, which caused it to appear left-aligned on wider
terminals. Now uses console.width() capped at 100 columns for
proper centering while maintaining readability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
